rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Elec. Code §253.176, which governs civil penalties imposed by the ethics commission after a formal hearing.
quote: The commission may impose a civil penalty against a person as provided by this subchapter only after a formal hearing as provided by Subchapter E, Chapter 571, Government Code.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns ethics commission civil penalties, unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
